summary: config.go and cliutil/credentials_test.go carry the OAuth2 direct-bearer env fallback emission ahead of the generator PR merging.
reason: Pristine 4.27.1 emits a config/test pair that contradict each other for OAuth2 authcode specs (generated CLI fails its own credential test; directly-held SPOTIFY_OAUTH_2_0 bearer ignored). These two files were re-emitted from the pending generator fix. Once that PR merges, the next reprint absorbs this and the entry can be dropped.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cliutil passes; AuthHeader honors SPOTIFY_OAUTH_2_0 when no minted token exists.
